'''Ghundrak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Thrasybule sector/Legends|Thrasybule sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
